user.title: Add Popular Times Sensor
user.description: Enter the address of a place and the URL of your stealth CDP browser.

data_description.address: Full address including place name, e.g. "McDonald's, Main Street 1, Berlin"
data_description.cdp_url: URL of your stealth CDP browser endpoint
data_description.name: Leave empty to use the place name from Google Maps
data_description.skip_live_check: Add the sensor even if no popularity data is available (e.g. place is currently closed)
data_description.scan_interval: How often to scrape Google Maps (2-60 minutes)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the CDP browser. Check the URL.
error.no_data: No popular times data found for this address. Check the address or enable 'Skip live data check'.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to scrape Google Maps (2-60 minutes)
